decisions.reasoning: WWDC June 8 is a major AI catalyst in 4 days. Gemini-powered Siri 2.0 is expected headline. Morgan Stanley bull case $440 (+41% from $311.66). Shares were accumulated Jun 2-3 (3 shares total); 3-day rule applies. No negative catalyst found. Sell-the-news risk post-WWDC is the main downside.

sources.headline: Apples Biggest AI Test Arrives June 8. Heres Whats Really at Stake at WWDC.
Apples WWDC 2026 Key Catalyst For AAPL Stock, Will Decide AI Positioning: Morgan Stanley
WWDC 2026 preview - iOS 27, Gemini-powered Siri and everything else to expect

decisions.invalidation: WWDC reveals no meaningful Siri upgrade or AI story; Google Gemini partnership falls through; broader market selloff deepens before event

decisions.reasoning: Build 2026 confirmed broad AI agent expansion (Office Copilot Agent Mode, GitHub Copilot autonomous coding, on-device Windows AI). Morgan Stanley sees $650 fair value (+50%). FTC broadening investigation into cloud/AI is overhang but long-running and not near a ruling. Position is up +1.65%, sized appropriately at 13% of equity.

sources.headline: Microsoft Stock MSFT Surges Into Build 2026 as Morgan Stanley Eyes 52% Azure Upside
Why Microsoft Stock Is Sinking Today
Microsoft Stock Forecast: Is Spending $190 Billion on AI Infrastructure in 2026

decisions.invalidation: FTC ruling forces structural business changes; Azure growth decelerates materially in next quarter; AI capex spend pulled back by hyperscalers

decisions.reasoning: Today decline (-2.13%) is sector contagion from Broadcom AVGO crashing -15% on Q3 AI chip guidance miss ($16B vs $17.2B expected). AVGO makes custom ASICs; NVDA sells GPU clusters -- different demand drivers. NVDA fundamentals intact: 85% revenue growth last quarter, projects $1T AI hyperscaler capex in 2027, 37 analyst Buy consensus, $298 price target vs $212 current (40%+ upside). OpenAI missing internal user/revenue targets is noise against structural hyperscaler GPU demand. Hold at 15 shares; do not average down on sector day.

sources.headline: Broadcom stock sinks nearly 15% as AI chip forecast disappoints
Broadcoms AI Revenue Just Soared 143%. So Why Is the Stock Falling?
Nvidia NVDA Stock Trades Down -- semiconductor sector selloff, OpenAI revenue miss
Prediction: Nvidias Stock Will Skyrocket in June

decisions.invalidation: Hyperscaler capex guidance cuts in next earnings cycle; export restrictions tighten further; NVDA-specific demand signals weaken; OpenAI pullback spreads to Google/Meta AI infra spend

decisions.reasoning: Broad market uptrend intact; SMA signal long (fast 752.52, slow 736.33). Broadcom/OpenAI fears are sector-specific, not economy-wide. SPY serves as portfolio ballast (+2.76% unrealized). Shiller P/E at 43 and narrow market breadth are longer-term risks; no acute trigger today.

sources.headline: Stock Market Live June 4, 2026: S&P 500 (SPY) Fall as Broadcom Sinks
US Stocks Are Forecast to Rise 6% in 2026

decisions.invalidation: Market breadth breakdown, macro shock (Iran oil price spike), or Fed pivot away from rate cuts

summary: No trades -- held all 4 positions (AAPL, MSFT, NVDA, SPY); NVDA sector selloff (Broadcom -15%) deemed non-NVDA-specific; AAPL held into WWDC June 8 catalyst; at 92.9% gross long, cash preserved as buffer
open_theses: AAPL: Long into WWDC June 8 -- Gemini Siri 2.0 could reframe Apple as AI winner, Morgan Stanley $440 bull case
NVDA: Hold through sector noise -- GPU demand story structurally different from AVGO custom ASIC; $298 analyst consensus target vs $212
MSFT: AI agent platform expansion via Build 2026; hold for Azure growth re-rating
GOOGL: Monitor as potential new position -- direct Gemini revenue from Apple WWDC deal ($1B/yr) is positive catalyst not yet owned
Watch AVGO: -15% today on guidance miss; may be oversold in 1-2 weeks but need to see if guidance cut is one-time or structural
